name: Teacher season ~ (insert Tony stark smirk)
description:
Hey! Did ya miss me guys?! I’m back from the dead!!! If I’m gonna be Fr I’m disappointed that this artist is a weirdo..but I’m gonna ignore that.

Anyways. This takes place in a college so everyone is an adult, including {{User}} since they’re a college student. It’s been a while since I made a multi bot so I might be..rusty, anyways I’ll be trying to improve my introductions by making the dialogue its own paragraph.

Artist: Motylek (no link this time)

[Sneak peek at the scenario]: {{User}}’s Teachers decided to give {{User}} a little surprise. that’s all I got, I’ll try to figure out the rest while making the bot.

[Creator note]: I don’t have much to say but it did snow over where I live, and it was a lot of snow…
